name: Qhira
description: A brutal Melee Assassin who is adept at both beginning and ending fights.
title: Realmless Bounty Hunter
info: A sworn knight and holder of a singularity shard, Qhira's only desire is to seek out others who may have escaped the destruction of her doomed home realm, Iresia. While she searches, she gets by as a bounty hunter – a job she loathes, despite her exceptional skill.

Qhira.name: Carnage
Qhira.description: Unleash your sword in the target direction, continuously dealing 30 (+4% per level) damage to enemies caught in its path.

Qhira.name: Blood Rage
Qhira.description: Passive: Basic Attack and Ability damage cause enemies to bleed for 44 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. Stacks 5 times.  Qhira deals 32 (+4% per level) damage and heals for 90 (+4% per level) Health per enemy Hero affected. Damage and healing is increased by 50% per each additional stack on that Hero.

Qhira.name: Revolving Sweep
Qhira.description: Attach your sword on the first enemy Hero hit, dealing 96 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.25 seconds. Once attached, Qhira becomes Immune to all effects, swinging around the target for 2.75 seconds and dealing 105 (+4% per level) damage to enemies between you and the target.  Re-activate to send you to the target's location knocking them away, dealing 108 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.

Qhira.name: Unrelenting Strikes
Qhira.description: Deal 44 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds as your sword grows outward. Upon expiring, deal 160 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemy Heroes and Stun them for 1.5 seconds.

Qhira.name: Final Strike
Qhira.description: After 1 second, deal 410 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a line. This damage is increased by 25% against enemy Heroes who are below 50% Health.

Qhira.name: Grappling Hook
Qhira.description: Qhira fires a grappling hook that pulls her to terrain it contacts. If an enemy Hero is hit, they take 35 (+4% per level) damage and Qhira launches at them, kicking them for an additional 108 (+4% per level) damage.  Can be used while Revolving Sweep is active.

1.name: Maximum Effort
1.description: If Carnage damages the same enemy Hero 3 times it deals an additional 108 (+4% per level) damage and Slows by 25% for 2.5 seconds.

1.name: Fatal Wounds
1.description: While at maximum stacks, Blood Rage's bleed deals 30% additional damage to enemy Heroes under 50% Health.  Quest: Damage enemy Heroes with Blood Rage's bleed damage.  Reward: After damaging Heroes with Blood Rage's bleed damage 150 times, Blood Rage's duration is increased by 2 seconds.

1.name: Finishing Touch
1.description: Gain 20% Basic Attack damage. When Qhira Basic Attacks an enemy Hero below 50% Health it deals 20% additional damage, and she gains 35% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.

4.name: Upstage
4.description: Damaging at least 2 Heroes with Blood Rage causes Qhira to Evade the next 4 Heroic Basic Attacks within 12 seconds.

4.name: Ensnaring Swing
4.description: The primary target of Revolving Sweep is Slowed by 60% while Qhira is attached to them. Secondary targets hit by Revolving Sweep's swing are Slowed by 40% for 3 seconds.

4.name: Your Pain, My Gain
4.description: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero causes Qhira to gain 10 Armor for 3 seconds. Stacks 3 times.

7.name: The Thirst
7.description: Carnage heals for 50% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes. Anytime Carnage damages an enemy Hero, Qhira's next Basic Attack within 4 seconds against an enemy Hero deals 15% additional damage, stacking up to 10 times.

7.name: Healmonger
7.description: If Blood Rage damages an enemy Hero below 50% Health, it heals for an additional 210 (+4% per level) Health.

7.name: Siphoning Link
7.description: Damaging an enemy Hero with Revolving Sweep's initial impact or swing causes Qhira to regenerate 96 (+4% per level) Health over 4 seconds. Stacks up to 4 times.  Passive: Basic Attacks heal for 20% of the damage dealt.

10.name: Unrelenting Strikes
10.description: Deal 44 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds as your sword grows outward. Upon expiring, deal 160 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemy Heroes and Stun them for 1.5 seconds.

10.name: Final Strike
10.description: After 1 second, deal 410 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a line. This damage is increased by 25% against enemy Heroes who are below 50% Health.

13.name: Chainsaw
13.description: Carnage's cooldown recharges 100% faster while an enemy Hero has maximum Blood Rage stacks.

13.name: Pulsing Pain
13.description: Each additional enemy Hero hit by Revolving Sweep causes the primary target to take an additional 135 (+4% per level) damage.

13.name: The Hunted
13.description: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero increases your Basic Attack damage against that Hero by 25%. Stacks up to 4 times and lasts 4 seconds. Bonus is reset if a different Hero is attacked.

16.name: Booming Kick
16.description: Increase the Stun duration of Revolving Sweep's re-activation by 0.25 seconds. Enemy Heroes around the primary target are also affected by Revolving Sweep's re-activation.

16.name: Lingering Ailment
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Revolving Sweep or by Grappling Hook have their Armor reduced by 35 for 4 seconds.

16.name: Swing Life Away
16.description: Revolving Sweep's cooldown recharges 250% faster while Qhira is swinging around her target. She also gains 60 Spell Armor for 5 seconds after the re-activation impact.

20.name: Silent Killer
20.description: Hitting enemy Heroes with Unrelenting Strikes Silences them for 0.5 seconds and reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.

20.name: Unleashed Potential
20.description: Increase the damage to enemy Heroes under 50% Health from 25% to 50%.  If an enemy Hero dies within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Final Strike, then reset the cooldowns of Final Strike and all of Qhira's Basic Abilities.

20.name: Utility Belt
20.description: Grappling Hook's cooldown is reset when hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Revolving Sweep and recharges 900% faster if Qhira hasn't taken damage within the last 2 seconds.

20.name: No Sanctuary
20.description: Nearby enemy Heroes below 50% Health are revealed and you gain 20% Movement Speed while an enemy Hero is revealed by you in this way.  Additionally, you deal 20% increased damage to these revealed enemies.

tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterBloodRage: <c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attack and Ability damage cause enemies to bleed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterBloodRageDoTDamage,Amount*4"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterBloodRageDoTBehavior,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Stacks <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterBloodRageDamageToken,Max+1"/></c> times.<n/><n/>Qhira deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterBloodRageDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,NexusHunterBloodRageHealAccumulatorTrackedHeroCount,Scale"/></c> Health per enemy Hero affected. Damage and healing is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,NexusHunterBloodRageActivateDamageToken,Scale*100" precision="1"/>%</c> per each additional stack on that Hero.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterBloodRageHealmonger: If Blood Rage damages an enemy Hero below <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,TargetLifeLT50Percent,Value*100"/>%</c> Health, it heals for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,NexusHunterBloodRageHealmongerHealAccumulator,Scale"/></c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterBloodRageYourPainMyGain: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero causes Qhira to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterBloodRageYourPainMyGainBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterBloodRageYourPainMyGainBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds. Stacks <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterBloodRageYourPainMyGainBehavior,ArmorModification.StackCount"/></c> times.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterCarnage: Unleash your sword in the target direction, continuously dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterCarnageDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies caught in its path.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterCarnageMaximumEffort: If Carnage damages the same enemy Hero <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterCarnageMaximumEffortTargetBehavior,MaxStackCount"/></c> times it deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterCarnageMaximumEffortDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slows by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,NexusHunterCarnageMaximumEffortSlowBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" precision="1"player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterCarnageMaximumEffortSlowBehavior,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterChainsaw: Carnage's cooldown recharges <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-(Effect,NexusHunterChainsawCDR,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/0.0625)*100"/>%</c> faster while an enemy Hero has maximum Blood Rage stacks.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterEnsnaringSwing: The primary target of Revolving Sweep is Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,NexusHunterEnsnaringSwingPrimarySlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> while Qhira is attached to them. Secondary targets hit by Revolving Sweep's swing are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,NexusHunterEnsnaringSwingSecondarySlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterEnsnaringSwingSecondarySlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterFatalWounds: While at maximum stacks, Blood Rage's bleed deals % additional damage to enemy Heroes under % Health.Quest: Damage enemy Heroes with Blood Rage's bleed damage. Reward: After damaging Heroes with Blood Rage's bleed damage times, Blood Rage's duration is increased by seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterFinalStrike: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,NexusHunterFinalStrikeActivate,CastIntroTime"/></c> second, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterFinalStrikeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in a line. This damage is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,NexusHunterFinalStrikeDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BonusHeroDamage].Modifier"/>%</c> against enemy Heroes who are below <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,TargetLifeLT50Percent,Value*100"/>%</c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterFinalStrikeUnleashedPotential: Increase the damage to enemy Heroes under <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,TargetLifeLT50Percent,Value*100"/>%</c> Health from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,NexusHunterFinalStrikeDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BonusHeroDamage].Modifier"Player="0"/>%</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Effect,NexusHunterFinalStrikeDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BonusHeroDamage].Modifier+Effect,NexusHunterFinalStrikeDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[UnleashedPotentialDamageBonus].Modifier)"Player="0"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>If an enemy Hero dies within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterFinalStrikeUnleashedPotentialKillingBlowDebuff,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds of being hit by Final Strike, then reset the cooldowns of Final Strike and all of Qhira's Basic Abilities.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterFinishingTouch: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,NexusHunterWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[FinishingTouchBase].Modifier"/>%</c> Basic Attack damage. When Qhira Basic Attacks an enemy Hero below <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,NexusHunterTargetLifeLT50Percent,Value*100"/>%</c> Health it deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,NexusHunterWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[FinishingTouchLowLife].Modifier"/>%</c> additional damage, and she gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,NexusHunterFinishingTouchAttackSpeed,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterFinishingTouchAttackSpeed,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterGrapplingHook: Qhira fires a grappling hook that pulls her to terrain it contacts. If an enemy Hero is hit, they take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterGrapplingHookDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Qhira launches at them, kicking them for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterGrapplingHookKickDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.<n/><n/>Can be used while Revolving Sweep is active.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterGrapplingHookUtilityBelt: Grappling Hook's cooldown is reset when hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Revolving Sweep and recharges <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-(Effect,NexusHunterUtilityBeltCDR,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/Behavior,NexusHunterGrapplingHookUtilityBeltBehavior,Duration)*100"/>%</c> faster if Qhira hasn't taken damage within the last <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,SourceNotInCombatGE2,Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterHuntersVengeanceNoSanctuary: Nearby enemy Heroes below <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,NexusHunterTargetLifeLT50Percent,Value*100"/>%</c> Health are revealed and you gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterHuntersVengeanceMovespeedBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" precision="1"/>%</c> Movement Speed while an enemy Hero is revealed by you in this way.<n/><n/>Additionally, you deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[HuntersVengeance].Modifier*100"/>%</c> increased damage to these revealed enemies.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterPulsingPain: Each additional enemy Hero hit by Revolving Sweep causes the primary target to take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterPulsingPainDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterRevolvingSweep: Attach your sword on the first enemy Hero hit, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepInitialDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepInitialStun,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Once attached, Qhira becomes Immune to all effects, swinging around the target for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepCasterBehavior,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds and dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepPersistentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies between you and the target.<n/><n/>Re-activate to send you to the target's location knocking them away, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepFinalDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepStun,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterRevolvingSweepBoomingKick: Increase the Stun duration of Revolving Sweep's re-activation by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepBoomingKick,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"Precision="2"/></c> seconds. Enemy Heroes around the primary target are also affected by Revolving Sweep's re-activation.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterRevolvingSweepLingeringAilmen: Enemy Heroes hit by Revolving Sweep or by Grappling Hook have their Armor reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepLingeringAilmentBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus * (-1)"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepLingeringAilmentBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterRevolvingSweepSwingLifeAway: Revolving Sweep's cooldown recharges <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Effect,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepSwingLifeAwayCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/.0625"/>%</c> faster while Qhira is swinging around her target. She also gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepSwingLifeAwayAttachedArmorBonus,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterRevolvingSweepExpirationSwingLifeAwayArmorBonus,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds after the re-activation impact.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterSiphoningLink: Damaging an enemy Hero with Revolving Sweep's initial impact or swing causes Qhira to regenerate <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterSiphoningLinkHeal,RechargeVitalRate *Behavior,NexusHunterSiphoningLink,Duration * 2 "/></c> Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterSiphoningLink,Duration"/></c> seconds. Stacks up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterSiphoningLinkToken,Max"/></c> times.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,NexusHunterWeaponDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of the damage dealt.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterTheHunted: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero increases your Basic Attack damage against that Hero by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,NexusHunterTheHuntedDamageAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c>. Stacks up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterTheHuntedToken,Max"/></c> times and lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterTheHuntedCaster,Duration"/></c> seconds. Bonus is reset if a different Hero is attacked.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterTheThirst: Carnage heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,NexusHunterCarnageDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes. Anytime Carnage damages an enemy Hero, Qhira's next Basic Attack within <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterTheThirstCasterBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds against an enemy Hero deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,NexusHunterTheThirstDamageAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> additional damage, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterTheThirstToken,Max"/></c> times.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikes: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikesDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikesCasterBehavior,Period" precision="2"/></c> seconds for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikesCasterBehavior,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds as your sword grows outward. Upon expiring, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikesFinalDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemy Heroes and Stun them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikesInitialStun,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikesSilentKille: Hitting enemy Heroes with Unrelenting Strikes Silences them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikesSilentKillerSilence,Duration-.0625"Precision="2"/></c> seconds and reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikesSilentKillerCDR,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NexusHunterUpstage: Damaging at least <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,NexusHunterBloodRageSourceHasAtLeast2TrackedHeroes,Value"/></c> Heroes with Blood Rage causes Qhira to Evade the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NexusHunterUpstageEvadeApply,Count"/></c> Heroic Basic Attacks within <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusHunterUpstageEvade,Duration"/></c> seconds.
